name: claude-multiacct
tagline: Run any number of Claude Desktop instances under different accounts on the same Mac.
sellMe: Claude Desktop stores OAuth per-userData directory. `--user-data-dir` lets you point at a second one; combined with `CLAUDE_CONFIG_DIR` for the embedded Claude Code CLI, the same app binary boots into a different identity. This CLI automates the install (per-instance configDir + userData + Dock-clickable clone with rewritten CFBundleIdentifier), safe cross-instance session sharing (symlinks for JSONL + UI + agent metadata; rsync for Chromium storage), repair + doctor diagnostics, and three launchd agents that keep everything current.

products.name: claude-multiacct
products.description: The CLI — install / uninstall / init / add-instance / remove-instance / list / repair / sync-now / sync-log / refresh-clones / doctor / qa.
